headline: Visual-variety strategy decided (ADR-0003, Adrian): SKINS are the unit — 2-4 coherent art directions (hero + section treatments + type scale + palette family + motion) behind one closed-enum config key, built as override-only presets over the section-variant rail; variants capped ~3/section and added only in service of a skin; bespoke stays the paid tier. Skin-mechanism build is PARKED per the freeze until outreach signals previews look samey; first skin candidate is the realtor warm-editorial direction (#23). Earlier the harvest slice merged and hardened the rail: #134 (layout.sections closed enums, hero split + split-card/banner variants, purity gate, /variants gallery page, template 0.4.0), #137 (baseline seed pushes a visual-baselines/<run-id> branch), #139 (first-ever committed visual baselines — the fleet-drift tripwire is now armed and green), ops vendored schema re-synced and merged (ops#169 by Adrian). Fleet also merged #136 (build-time branded OG-image fallback, closes #105) and #127 (demo e2e coverage restored in ralph gate, closes #67). PR #160 (slice-2, #156) opened: extends the satisfies-checked dispatcher rail from hero-only to services/gallery/reviews — invisible first-harvest refactor (moved to components/<section>/<variant>.astro + dispatcher under the original filename), no new variants, no schema change, byte-identical dist build proven on demo-pressure-pros (31/31 files sha256-matched). Unblocks #130 (services variants) and any reviews/gallery variants. All 7 apps build clean. Engine still frozen pending ops cutover (#10). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: Merge PR #160 (services/gallery/reviews section dispatchers, closes #156) — unblocks #130
OUTREACH: get the first paying client — the engine has enough variety; new skins wait for a real 'previews look samey' signal
On that signal (or freeze lift): build the skin mechanism (design key + override-only presets, content-packs pattern) then port realtor warm-editorial as skin #1 — parked issues under epic #128
Before hero variant #5 (i.e. before skin #1 lands): extract shared hero CTA/image partials (#133)

Ralph idle-watchdog + reconcile fix DONE fleet-wide; make `Engine tests` (hirobius/ralph) and each repo's ralph-gate the required branch-protection checks; triage ops's pre-existing red pnpm-audit gate (55 vulns, non-required); fix the ralph README's `git tag -f v1` line — v1 is a branch
Work the open needs-human backlog: trust/conversion fields (#87), per-vertical content packs (#85), analytics/conversion events (#84), aesthetics dials (#86)
Set real form.accessKey (Web3Forms) + hcaptchaSiteKey before any prospect outreach
Delete the frozen packages/agent engine once ops's first live generate passes (#10)
blocked: Skin mechanism + warm-editorial port parked on freeze/client signal (ADR-0003)
Autonomous site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops)
Engine delete (#10) waits on ops's first live generate
#84/#85/#87/#35/#41/#27 need a human decision before Ralph can pick them up
